name: Ballway
short_description: Ballway is a casual physical puzzle with explosions. The player's goal is to keep the ball on the green platform, using explosive and other interactive blocks in order to pass the level.
detailed_description:
Ballway is a casual physical puzzle with explosions. The player's goal is to keep the ball on the green platform, using explosive and other interactive blocks in order to pass the level.

Features:

  • 50 Levels.
  • Advanced physics.
  • Relaxing gameplay.
about_the_game:
Ballway is a casual physical puzzle with explosions. The player's goal is to keep the ball on the green platform, using explosive and other interactive blocks in order to pass the level.

Features:

  • Advanced physics.
  • Relaxing gameplay.
supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Arabic, Bulgarian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Finnish, Greek, Hungarian, Japanese, Korean, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Romanian, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Swedish, Thai, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian
